title: Counterfactual Change
question: What would have changed if one input, rule, threshold, or institutional condition had differed?
review_prompt: Name the changed condition and the unchanged background assumptions.
governance_warning: A model-level change is not automatically a world-level causal intervention.

title: Recourse Feasibility
question: Can the proposed change realistically be made by the affected person or institution?
review_prompt: Separate mathematical possibility from actionable recourse.
governance_warning: Do not present immutable, protected, historical, or structural constraints as individual responsibility.

title: Threshold Sensitivity
question: How many outcomes change when the decision boundary moves?
review_prompt: Identify near-boundary cases and escalation rules.
governance_warning: Small threshold changes can create large institutional consequences.
